jsonLd.title: FurnitureMart is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the FurnitureMart family as a E-commerce Executive in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!
